people.usage: Place only on sidewalks, pavement, parks, plazas, building entrances, or pedestrian spaces.

cars.usage: Place only on valid lane tiles or parking slots. Direction must match lane metadata.

invalid.reason: Direction rows are invalid; right-facing row appears vertical.

parking.rule: Parking slot must be at least largest car bbox plus 14px padding on each axis total.

roads.usage: Use as technical terrain reference. Do not use road arrows. Roads should be represented in the map graph as two-lane corridors.

sidewalkOverlay.usage: Use as a visual overlay on pavement tiles adjacent to roads. It should be drawn after pavement/road terrain and before buildings, props, cars, and characters.

props.usage: Large props can occupy tiles. Traffic lights should usually be redrawn or used as small overlays, not full terrain tiles.

facades.usage: Use the 96x96 native facade sheet for gameplay. Collider must match the visual rect: 1.5x1.5 tiles when tileSize is 64. Do not use the old 64x64 facade sheet for new gameplay placement.

overlays.rule: Small signs, traffic lights, lamps, hydrants, parking meters, and decorative lights should be placed with pixel offsets and smaller hitboxes. They should not consume a terrain tile unless intentionally used as a large prop.

validation: All road tiles must be connected.
Cars must be on valid lane tiles.
Buildings must have at least one sidewalk/pavement tile between footprint and road.
Crosswalks must span the full road width.
Parking lots must connect to roads by driveway.
